message:
test(storage): add storage_root to all DbPoolConfig constructors in storage crate

Update storage crate lib.rs tests and stress_pipeline integration tests to set
storage_root explicitly in DbPoolConfig, matching the new required field added
to the db crate. Uses config.storage_root for internal tests and sibling
"storage" directories for stress tests to prevent environment leakage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
